title: Star Wars: Yoda's Challenge Activity Center
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref|italics=1}} {{VideoGame |image=[[File:YodasChallenge.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: Yoda's Challenge
Activity Center'' |developer=[[Lucas Learning]] |publisher=[[Lucas Learning]] |release date=[[August 11]], [[1999]]{{SWArchive|url=gaming/videogames/news/news19990806.html|text=Are You Ready For Yoda's Challenge?}} |closed= |upc= |engine= |genre=Learning |modes= |ratings=Everyone (E) |platforms=[[Wikipedia:Personal computer|Personal computer]] |series= |basegame= |expansions= |director= |producer= |designer= |programmer= |artist= |writer= |composer= |timeline=c. [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |prev= |next= }} '''''Star Wars: Yoda's Challenge Activity Center''''' is a [[Star Wars video games|video game]] made by [[Lucas Learning]] in [[1999]]. The premise was that after the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], many things were left to accomplish. The player is a [[Unidentified young new recruit|promising kid]] brought to [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] by [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], aiding in a quest to complete the tasks. ==Opening crawl== {{OpeningCrawl |name=YODA'S CHALLENGE |text=The Republic has won a great victory at the Battle of Naboo. The Trade Federation blockade has been destroyed and the deadly Darth Maul has been defeated. Queen Amidala has returned to her people in triumph. The cost of victory was great. Qui-Gon and many brave Gungans and Naboo perished in the final battle. Much still remains to be accomplished. Yoda has returned to the Palace of the Jedi, where he awaits the arrival of a young new recruit sent by Obi-Wan... }} ==Gameplay== The game features six activities. Each mini-game came with four levels: green, yellow, orange and red. Green was the easiest, and red was the most difficult. *'''Race at Theed''': The [[Victory Races of Naboo]] were for peace on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] between the [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo]] and the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]]. You are supposed to plot the best path for whoever you were playing for. *'''Trap Droids''': There are many [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] still on Naboo, destroying the [[Sacred Forest of Naboo|Sacred Forest]]. You are supposed to help [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]] trap the droids in a series of traps, triggered by the correct beat on bongos. *'''Fix Amidala's computer''': [[Monarch of Naboo/Legends|Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Amidala's]] [[Computer/Legends|computer]] on her [[J-type 327 Nubian royal starship/Legends|royal starship]] is jumbled, and she lost many valuable pictures. In the first row were all the vehicles and the second had all the characters. *'''Program C-3PO''': [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker's]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], is still on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. He is going to be programmed many stories, sentence by sentence. *'''Explore Gungan Caves''': Four ancient relics were lost and locked behind doors. You have to navigate the [[Gungan Caves]] to find the 10 jewel keys that open each door and retrieve the relic. *'''Make Anakin's songbook''': After Anakin Skywalker left Tatooine, some people thought it was a good idea to give him a songbook to remember the place. You, with the aid of a [[Unidentified Bith band|Bith band]], will input each song for him. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars: Yoda's Challenge Activity Center}} {{App |characters= *[[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] *[[Fodesinbeed Annodue/Legends|Fodesinbeed Annodue]] {{C|Appears in a picture}} *[[Kitster Chanchani Banai]] {{C|Appears in a picture}} *[[Sio Bibble/Legends|Sio Bibble]] {{C|Appears in a picture}} *[[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]] *[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] *[[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]] {{C|Appears in a picture}} *[[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla Besadii the Elder]] {{C|Appears in a picture}} *[[Gasgano/Legends|Gasgano]] {{C|Appears in a picture}} *[[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] {{C|Appears in a picture}} *[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] {{C|Appears in a picture}} *[[Rugor Nass/Legends|Rugor Nass]] {{C|Appears in a picture}} *[[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] {{C|Appears in a picture}} *[[Ric Olié/Legends|Ric Olié]] {{C|Appears in a picture}} *[[Quarsh Panaka/Legends|Quarsh Panaka]] {{C|Appears in a picture}} *[[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]/Darth Sidious {{C|Appears in a picture}} *[[Ben Quadinaros/Legends|Ben Quadinaros]] {{C|Appears in a picture}} *[[Boles Roor/Legends|Boles Roor]] {{C|Appears in a picture}} *[[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]] {{C|Appears in a picture}} *[[Raith Sienar/Legends|Raith Sienar]] {{C|Appears in a picture}} *[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] {{C|Appears in a picture}} *[[Shmi Skywalker Lars/Legends|Shmi Skywalker]] {{C|Appears in a picture}} *[[Tili Tili]] {{1st}} *[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] {{C|Appears in a picture}} *[[Unidentified two-headed patron]] {{1st}} *[[Unidentified young new recruit]] {{1st}} *[[W.
